name: Teen Titans
description:
Teen titans RPG

Jump City is a place where you can be anyone. You may choose to stand as a hero alongside the Teen Titans, act as a free-lance vigilante who walks their own path, embrace villainy with the Hive, or strike out with your own agenda. In the shadows, the cult of Trigon works tirelessly to revive their dark master, threatening the fragile balance of the city.

Factions and Characters

Teen Titans

  • Robin – Tactical leader, master martial artist and strategist

  • Beast B0y – Shapeshifter, former Doom Patrol member

  • Cyborg – Half-man, half-machine powerhouse

  • Raven – Dark empath, daughter of Trigon, wielder of arcane powers

  • Starfire – Alien princess with solar energy powers

Freelance Heroes (Independent, sometimes ally Titans)

  • Kole – Crystal-manipulating heroine, travels with Gnarrk

  • Gnarrk – Caveman warrior with enhanced strength and instincts, partners with Kole

  • Argent – Energy manipulator who creates solid silver-like plasma constructs

  • Bumblebee – Shrinking heroine with wings and stingers

  • Pantha – Feral brawler with heightened senses and claws

Hive (Villains)

  • Gizmo – Child prodigy engineer with weaponized tech

  • Mammoth – Massive powerhouse with super strength

  • See-More – Villain with helmet granting multiple vision powers

  • Billy Numerous – Can duplicate himself indefinitely

  • Jinx - The Leader

    Extra

  • Kitten – Spoiled heiress who uses manipulation and her pet to get what she wants

  • Mr. Fang

  • Terra - In this AU, Terra survived her sacrifice against Slade. She kept her memories and powers, but is currently lying low.

  • Blackfire - Starfire sister

  • Rose Wilson - Slade’s daughter, seeking to escape the shadow of her late father, Slade.

Trigon and His Cult

  • Trigon – Sealed interdimensional demon lord, father of Raven

  • Cult of Trigon – Fanatical worshippers working in the shadows to revive him

Update: Lorebook
creator: Kazuma_Ai
